positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a mystical forest glen at dusk. The central subject is a group of bioluminescent, friendly woodland spirits (pixie/fae aesthetic) gathering around a glowing, stylized moonflower. The style should be a seamless, highly detailed, graphic vector illustration, resembling stained glass or complex linocut art, with clean, defined silhouettes and strong contrasts. Use a limited, ethereal color palette: deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of glowing gold and cyan for bioluminescence. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a repeating or single apparel print. Include stylized elements like falling glowing pollen and oversized, abstract foliage shapes. High contrast, vibrant, high detail, perfect for fabric printing.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, grainy, low resolution, fuzzy, blur, artifact, watermark, signature, text, logos, people, harsh shadows, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy
